g.text: API Gateway Deployment Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- Route collection equivalence is part of the modeled ready
path, but the current formal state partition does not
- Code and tests treat OCI DELETING as requeueing even
though spec.cfg only names CREATING and UPDATING as
- Confirm deletion with follow-up GetDeployment calls until
the lifecycle is DELETED or the resource is not found.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
OCI deletion is confirmed and the finalizer can be removed
